hero.headline: When the lights go out, we *show up*
hero.subheadline: Licensed Chattanooga electricians with trucks ready and tools loaded. No job too big, no hour too late.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every outlet, panel, and wire — handled
services_section.subheading: From storm damage repairs to new installations

services.title: Electrical Repairs
services.description: Outlets not working, breakers tripping, or complete power outages. We diagnose the problem and fix it right.

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Old electrical panels can't handle modern loads. We install new panels that keep your power flowing safely.

services.title: Storm Restoration
services.description: Lightning strikes and storm damage require immediate attention. We restore power when nature interrupts.

services.title: New Installations
services.description: Adding circuits, installing fixtures, or wiring new construction. Clean work that passes inspection.

about.heading: Mountain City Electric
about.body: We're a Chattanooga electrical team that shows up when we say we will. One call gets you licensed electricians who fix it right the first time.

reviews.name: William B.
reviews.text: Caring and efficient — showed up on schedule and restored power quickly and completely. Absolutely would use again.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Chattanooga and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Same-day service throughout the Tennessee Valley

cta.heading: Power problems don't wait — neither do we
cta.body: Licensed electricians with trucks loaded and ready. Call now for your free estimate or emergency service.
